_comment: Runtime recolor is mask-driven: a tk2d atlas is recolored only when CloakMasks/<collection>/<texture>.png (or legacy CloakMasks/<texture>.png) exists. Missing masks are left untouched; no runtime mask baking or collection allowlist is used.
_comment_mapIcon: When true, logs SSMP compass/map-icon sync (without cloak scanner noise unless debugLogging is on).
_comment_heroMesh: CloakRecolor re-scans the player MeshRenderer list every N frames; material re-apply is still every LateUpdate.
_comment_dumpTex: When true, first use of each mask writes the game's mainTexture beside it as <mask-stem>-original.png (skipped if that file already exists).
